    People also ask
    Who is the biggest supplier of steel?
    China's Baowu Group
    Largest steel producers worldwide based on production volume 2024. In 2024, China's Baowu Group was ranked as the world's largest steel producer. China Baowu Group produced around 130.09 million metric tons of crude steel that year, around 65 million metric tons more than ArcelorMittal, which was second in the ranking.
